content: PLN Insurance DMS v2 - 12 phase upgrade plan. Phase 1: DB schema extensions (warehouses, document_versions, roles tables, new enum values). Phase 2: shadcn/ui setup + component migration. Phase 3: Warehouses page. Phase 4: Access Control + Admin Console. Phase 5: Version Control. Phase 6: Advanced Search page. Phase 7: OCR Validation Workbench. Phase 8: Enhanced Document Ingestion. Phase 9: Enhanced Documents Table. Phase 10: Rich Analytics Dashboard. Phase 11: Enhanced Audit Trail. Phase 12: Cleanup and final polish.
